elements.title: a 4th-century set of Roman glassware
elements.contents: ... that a 4th-century set of Roman glassware (pictured) was highly valued by Silla royalty in Korea, and is considered a National Treasure?

elements.contents: ... that the Tabaru River hosts the westernmost mangroves in Japan?

elements.contents: ... that the Heliodorus stele is an independent source for an episode previously known only from 2 Maccabees?

elements.title: a 1995 romance novel
elements.contents: ... that one critic described a 1995 romance novel as having characters with "all the depth of a cookie sheet (though fewer dimensions)"?

elements.title: Robert Dalzell
elements.contents: ... that Robert Dalzell avoided a court-martial by marrying his commander's daughter?

elements.title: Then You Try Making It!
